steps.name: User launches Collections page
User closes popup if present
User navigates to New Arrivals
Display Oasis submenu items

elements.name: TC01_Verify first three study chairs are fetched

steps.name: User navigates to Study Chairs page
User dismisses introductory popups on study chairs page
User sorts the study chairs by popularity
User stores the first three study chair names
Exactly three study chair names should be present

elements.name: TC02_Verify fetched products are study chairs

steps.name: User navigates to Study Chairs page
User dismisses introductory popups on study chairs page
User sorts the study chairs by popularity
User stores the first three study chair names
All fetched products should belong to study chairs category

elements.name: TC01_Verify Product List Is Not Empty

steps.name: User launches the website
User dismisses introductory popups on homepage
User navigates to the Bookshelves section via Storage Furniture menu
User applies the open storage type filter
The product results list should not be empty
User launches the website
User dismisses introductory popups on homepage
User navigates to the Bookshelves section via Storage Furniture menu
User applies the open storage type filter
The results should display up to 5 items and all displayed items must contain "Bookshelf"

elements.name: Navigate and Fill Gift Card Form

steps.name: User launches the website on "Chrome"
User navigates to Gift Cards
User launches the website on "Chrome"
User navigates to Gift Cards
User fills details
